text: my favourite color is pink

my favourite movie is Dhurandhar
Nice to know! *Dhurandhar*—that’s the 2003 Bollywood film starring Sunil Shetty, right? What’s your favorite part of it?
no no, 2025 film starring Ranveer Singh
Got it! So the 2025 *Dhurandhar* starring Ranveer Singh is your pick. What draws you to that movie?
everything, songs especially, acting omg
That’s awesome! The 2025 *Dhurandhar* really has a mix of great music and strong performances. Which song or scene stuck with you the most?
gehra hua idk i love each n every song
That’s awesome—every track seems to hit the right note for you! 🎶 “Gehra Hua” is one that really stands out. Is there a particular line or lyric from it that you keep humming?
what is my fav color
Your favorite color is pink.
my fav song?
I’m not sure which specific track you’d pick as your favorite—if you’d like, tell me which song from *Dhurandhar* you feel most drawn to, and we can dive into it!
gehra hua i told u

Got it—“Gehra Hua” is your favorite song! 🎶  
Is there a particular lyric or part of the track that you find especially memorable?
what is my fav song

Your favorite song is “Gehra Hua.”  
What’s your favorite part of it—maybe a lyric, the beat, or the mood? Feel free to share!
